AI receptionist for local business: the practical version.

instagram.creativeBrief: Carousel: Slide 1 problem statement, Slide 2 what to fix first, Slide 3 technical SEO checks, Slide 4 internal links, Slide 5 CTA to project brief.

shortFormVideo.hook: Your AI receptionist should not answer everything. It should protect the lead handoff.
shortFormVideo.script: Open with the common problem: local businesses miss calls, chats, and form leads after hours. Explain the EB28 rule: automate greetings, routing, FAQs, intake, reminders, and CRM capture, but keep pricing exceptions, complaints, custom recommendations, and final sales decisions with a human. Close by sending viewers to the EB28 AI receptionist guide.
shortFormVideo.shotList: Screen capture of the article headline, quick cuts of a missed-call log and website form, overlay list of automate versus keep human, final card with eb28.co/blog/.
shortFormVideo.caption: AI receptionist for local business: automate the first response, protect the human handoff, and measure whether leads actually convert. Full guide: eb28.co/blog/
